steps.title: Signal a limitation
steps.content: The previous sentence describes a successful asteroid-deflection test on a secondary object. The next sentence says these results are no guarantee for primary objects. The blank must concede the success while introducing a limitation.

steps.title: Reject addition and result
steps.content: A would signal that the primary-object conclusion follows from the success, but the text limits that inference. C would signal similarity, which conflicts with "no guarantee." D would add support rather than concede a caveat. The answer is B.
